title: Consolidate Manager Classes

tasks.description: Merge EntityManager and ObservationManager - Move addObservations() and deleteObservations() into EntityManager, update all imports, delete ObservationManager.ts
Merge TagManager into EntityManager - Move addTags(), removeTags(), setImportance(), addTagsToMultipleEntities(), replaceTag(), mergeTags() into EntityManager, keep TagAliasManager separate

Merge HierarchyManager into EntityManager - Move all 9 hierarchy methods (setEntityParent, getChildren, getParent, getAncestors, getDescendants, getSubtree, getRootEntities, getEntityDepth, moveEntity) into EntityManager
Create unified SearchManager facade - Inline BasicSearch, BooleanSearch, RankedSearch, FuzzySearch logic into single SearchManager class with intelligent dispatch
acceptanceCriteria: Single SearchManager with all search logic

tasks.description: Update KnowledgeGraphManager to use consolidated classes - Reduce from 10 lazy-loaded managers to 4 (EntityManager, RelationManager, SearchManager, ExportManager)
acceptanceCriteria: KnowledgeGraphManager reduced from 552 lines to ~300 lines

successCriteria: Architecture is simpler and easier to understand
notes: This sprint addresses the over-engineering problem of having 10 managers for a single JSONL file. After consolidation, the architecture is: EntityManager (entities, observations, tags, hierarchy), RelationManager (relations), SearchManager (all search), ExportManager (import/export/backup). TagAliasManager remains separate since it uses a different data file.
